title: ServiceManifest
description: A provider's catalog of available services, published at /.well-known/osp.json

previous_version.description: Previous manifest version, null for first version

osp_spec_version.description: Version of the OSP specification this manifest conforms to

provider_public_key.description: Ed25519 public key (base64url) for manifest verification

offerings.description: List of service offerings available from this provider

trust_tier_required.description: Minimum agent trust tier to provision (0=anonymous, 1=verified, 2=bonded, 3=enterprise)

endpoints.description: API endpoints for provisioning lifecycle operations

a2a.description: A2A agent card for delegated provisioning (v1.1)

finops.description: FinOps budget and cost guardrails configuration (v1.1)

scorecards.description: Service maturity scorecards and compliance checklists (v1.1)

webhook_retry_policy.description: Webhook retry policy declaration for informing agents of retry behavior (Section 8.5)

effective_at.description: When this manifest version becomes effective (ISO 8601)

provider_signature.description: Ed25519 signature over canonical JSON (excluding this field)

ServiceOffering.description: A single service offering within the provider's catalog

name.description: Human-readable name of the service offering

description.description: Detailed description of the service offering

category.description: Service category for discovery and filtering

tiers.description: Available pricing/capability tiers for this offering

credentials_schema.description: JSON Schema describing the credentials that will be returned upon provisioning

estimated_provision_seconds.description: Estimated time to provision in seconds

fulfillment_proof_type.description: How the provider proves fulfillment after provisioning

available_regions.description: Simple list of available region identifiers for quick enumeration. Complements 'regions' which may contain RegionObjects with jurisdiction metadata.

documentation_url.description: URL to the service offering's documentation

dependencies.description: Other offering IDs that this offering depends on (v1.1)

sbom_url.description: URL to the SBOM (Software Bill of Materials) for this offering (v1.1)

ServiceTier.description: A pricing/capability tier within a service offering

tier_id.description: Unique identifier for this tier within the offering

limits.description: Tier-specific resource limits (storage_mb, api_calls, connections, etc.)

features.description: List of features included in this tier

escrow_profile.description: Escrow timing parameters for paid tiers

ttl_seconds.description: Default environment TTL in seconds, null for no expiry (v1.1)

Price.description: Pricing information with currency and optional billing interval

amount.description: Price amount as string to avoid floating point precision issues (e.g., '25.00')

currency.description: ISO 4217 currency code or stablecoin identifier

interval.description: Billing interval as ISO 8601 duration (P1M = monthly, P1Y = yearly), null for one-time charges

EscrowProfile.description: Escrow timing parameters governing payment hold and release

timeout_seconds.description: Maximum time in seconds before escrowed funds are returned if provisioning fails

verification_window_seconds.description: Time in seconds the agent has to verify provisioning before auto-release

dispute_window_seconds.description: Time in seconds after verification during which disputes can be raised

UsageMetering.description: Configuration for usage-based metering and billing

reporting_window.description: How often usage is reported, as ISO 8601 duration (e.g., 'PT1H' for hourly)

countersignature_required.description: Whether the agent must countersign usage reports for billing

ProviderEndpoints.description: API endpoint paths for provisioning lifecycle operations

provision.description: POST endpoint path for provisioning new resources

deprovision.description: DELETE endpoint path for deprovisioning resources

credentials.description: GET endpoint path for retrieving current credentials

rotate.description: POST endpoint path for credential rotation

status.description: GET endpoint path for resource status

usage.description: GET endpoint path for usage/metering data

health.description: GET endpoint path for provider health checks

dependency_graph.description: GET endpoint path for dependency graph (v1.1)

scorecard.description: GET endpoint path for service scorecard (v1.1)

skills.description: GET endpoint path for LLM skills document (v1.1)

A2AAgentCard.description: A2A agent card enabling delegated provisioning between agents (v1.1)

agent_id.description: Unique agent identifier for this provider

delegation_endpoint.description: Endpoint for receiving delegated provisioning requests from other agents

task_lifecycle.description: Whether this provider supports A2A task lifecycle states

agent_public_key.description: Ed25519 public key for agent-to-agent communication (base64url)

short_lived_tokens.description: Provider supports short-lived token issuance instead of static API keys

token_ttl_seconds.description: Default TTL for short-lived tokens in seconds

orphan_detection.description: Provider supports NHI inventory and orphan identity detection

FinOpsConfig.description: FinOps budget guardrails and cost-as-code configuration (v1.1)

budget_enforcement.description: Provider supports budget guardrails and spend limits

cost_in_pr.description: Provider supports cost-in-PR previews for config changes

anomaly_detection.description: Provider supports cost anomaly detection and alerting

burn_rate_tracking.description: Provider supports environment burn rate tracking with TTLs

budget_endpoint.description: Endpoint for budget and cost management operations

DependencyGraph.description: Service dependency graph metadata for impact analysis (v1.1)

auto_generate.description: Provider can auto-generate dependency graph from project state

impact_analysis.description: Provider supports impact analysis before deprovision/rotate

health_propagation.description: Unhealthy service propagates warnings to dependents

Scorecards.description: Service maturity scorecards and compliance checklists (v1.1)

maturity_scores.description: Maturity scores by dimension (monitoring, backups, rotation, https, etc.)

compliance.description: Compliance frameworks supported by this provider

guided_remediation.description: Provider supports guided remediation via osp fix commands

ObservabilityConfig.description: Agent observability and OpenTelemetry tracing configuration (v1.1)

otel_endpoint.description: OpenTelemetry collector endpoint for sending traces

audit_log.description: Provider exposes structured queryable audit log

cost_per_action.description: Provider tracks cost per agent action

tools.description: MCP tool names this provider exposes

streamable_http.description: Provider supports MCP Streamable HTTP transport

skills_url.description: URL to the provider's LLM skills document

WebhookRetryPolicy.description: Webhook retry policy configuration declaring the provider's retry behavior for failed webhook deliveries (Section 8.5)

max_attempts.description: Maximum number of delivery attempts including the initial attempt

backoff_multiplier.description: Multiplier for exponential backoff between retry attempts

initial_delay_seconds.description: Delay in seconds before the first retry attempt

max_delay_seconds.description: Maximum delay in seconds between retry attempts

response_timeout_seconds.description: How long the provider waits for a 2xx response before considering delivery failed

dead_letter_queue.description: Whether the provider persists failed events in a dead letter queue for later replay
